items.title: Father, Son Duo Behind Bondi Beach Shooting In Sydney, Trump Calls It Obvious 'Antisemitic Attack,' Bill Ackman Praises 'Hero Who Saved Lives'
items.description: Global leaders including Donald Trump, Barack Obama, Joe Biden, Narendra Modi and Canada's prime minister condemned a targeted antisemitic Hanukkah shooting at Sydney's Bondi Beach that killed 16 people, while also praising a bystander whose bravery helped stop the attack and expressing solidarity with Jewish communities worldwide.

items.title: Tableau Services Market Set for Strong Growth to USD 6.86 Billion by 2033, Driven by Rising Demand for Real-Time Analytics and Data-Driven Decisions | Report by SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global Tableau Services Market is projected to grow from USD 2.68 billion in 2025 to USD 6.86 billion by 2033, driven by increasing demand for real-time analytics, AI-powered insights, and cloud-based business intelligence solutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a key player in Tableau Services market with potential for growth in data analytics and consulting services
Included among key players in the data visualization and analytics market
Highlighted for successful migration of a global pharmaceutical client's BI system, demonstrating technological capability
